name: Olive Garden Tiramisu Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 Sponge cake (10-12 inch), about 3 inches tall
3 oz Strong black coffee, or Instant espresso
1 1/2 lb Cream cheese or mascarpone, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut across the middle of the sponge cake to form two layers, each about 1 1/2 inches high.
2. Blend the coffee and brandy together.
3. Sprinkle enough of the mixture over the bottom half of the cake to flavor it strongly. Do not moisten the cake too much or it may collapse when served.
4. Beat the room-temperature cheese and 1 cup of sugar until completely dissolved and light and spreadable. Test for sweetness during beating and add more sugar if needed.
5. Spread half of the cheese mixture over the cut surface of the bottom layer.
6. Replace the second layer and top with the remaining cheese mixture.
7. Sprinkle the top liberally with sifted cocoa powder.
8. Refrigerate the cake for at least 2 hours before cutting and serving.
